body.body:
Seed all ~20 core Engram patterns as TEMPLATE Memory nodes.

Original 10: WONDER, FILE_ITERATOR, THRESHOLD_ALERT, SCHEDULER_TICK, READER_LOOP, MEMORY_DEPOSIT, SEARCH_AND_RESPOND, CONDITION_GATE, ERROR_RECOVERY, ASYNC_DELEGATE.

Igor's 10 (2026-03-22): ESCALATION_LADDER (tier.1‚Üífail‚Üítier.2‚Üífail‚Üítier.3 ‚Äî progressive resource escalation, distinct from ERROR_RECOVERY), CURSOR_RESUME (load_checkpoint‚Üíbatch‚Üísave_cursor‚Üíhalt ‚Äî persists across sessions, distinct from FILE_ITERATOR), BLOOM_INHIBIT (score all candidates‚Üílateral inhibition‚Üíwinner emerges‚Üílosers suppressed ‚Äî BG scoring model, may be primitive for CONDITION_GATE+THRESHOLD_ALERT), PREDICTION_CORRECTION (predict‚Üíobserve‚Üídelta‚Üíupdate weights ‚Äî NE prospective/actual pair, learning loop in execution), DISTILLATION (cluster EPISODICs‚Üíextract pattern‚Üídeposit higher-type node ‚Äî matrix compression toward understanding, MOST IMPORTANT MISSING ONE), SIGNAL_DEBOUNCE (signal‚Üíwait N‚Üífire only if persists‚Üícooldown ‚Äî NE min/max interval), PRIMING (activate A‚Üíraise base probability for related B‚Üítime window‚Üídecay ‚Äî anticipatory, not reactive), AFFECT_MODULATE (read milieu‚Üíadjust thresholds/weights across all active habits‚Üíglobal tuning ‚Äî milieu as pervasive parameter), REFRAME (observe X‚Üíapply interpretive lens‚Üínew meaning‚Üípush modified obs ‚Äî interpretive traverse), FANOUT_GATHER (trigger‚ÜíN parallel delegations‚Üíwait all‚Üímerge‚Üícontinue ‚Äî distinct from ASYNC_DELEGATE which is one branch).

Seed script: claudecode/seed_templates.py. Prereq: T-template-schema.

Akien's addition (2026-03-23): CACHED_PROBE ‚Äî payload-configured data monitor with dual invocation mode and optional worry branch. trigger‚Üícheck age; if stale: refresh; if explicit: surface; if worry_after exceeded: worry; end. Payload: source, cache_ttl, worry_after (optional), cached_data, cached_at. Replaces bespoke resource monitors (PROC_DISK_USAGE_CHECK etc). Distinct from THRESHOLD_ALERT (age-based, not accumulation-based).
body.title: Seed ~10 core Igor design patterns as TEMPLATE nodes in the matrix
body.result: seed_templates.py: all 21 Engram patterns seeded as TEMPLATE Memory nodes. WONDER (tpl-wonder) from T-template-schema present. 20 new patterns: FILE_ITERATOR, THRESHOLD_ALERT, SCHEDULER_TICK, READER_LOOP, MEMORY_DEPOSIT, SEARCH_AND_RESPOND, CONDITION_GATE, ERROR_RECOVERY, ASYNC_DELEGATE, ESCALATION_LADDER, CURSOR_RESUME, BLOOM_INHIBIT, PREDICTION_CORRECTION (2 habits), DISTILLATION, SIGNAL_DEBOUNCE, PRIMING, AFFECT_MODULATE, REFRAME, FANOUT_GATHER (2 habits), CACHED_PROBE (2 habits). 30 tests pass.
